response.step_by_step_log: The entire video was analyzed to detect if any vocal music tracks were present. The audio throughout the video consists entirely of character dialogue (voiceover) and background instrumental music. No songs with sung lyrics were detected. Therefore, no web searches for lyrics were required.
response.global_summary: A promotional announcement video for merchandise related to two virtual characters (Fuwa and Moco). The video showcases merchandise sets, describes their features, and features dialogue between the two hosts and a guest host, Kuro-chan, on a stage. No vocal songs are present.

scenes.description: Promotional slides with background instrumental music and character voiceover showcasing merchandise like finger puppets, birthday sets, and voice packs.
The two virtual characters appear on a stage surrounded by balloons, talking to the audience about their new merchandise.
The guest host, Kuro-chan, joins the two characters on stage and introduces himself to the audience.
